sections.paragraph:
σάρδινος, ου, ὁ (An. Ox. IV 229) late form of σάρδιον Rv 4:3 v.l.; s. σάρδιον.—DELG s.v. σάρδιον.

An. Ox. An. Ox. = Anecdota Graeca, ed. JCramer, fr. Oxford mss.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 913
